title: Clean and disinfect poultry production sheds
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Clean and disinfect poultry production sheds demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to clean sheds

pcs.text: Identify and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on poultry farm and in sheds
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on poultry farm and in sheds?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on poultry farm and in sheds.

pcs.text: Confirm sheds being cleaned, scope of work and cleaning methods, and create cleaning plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm sheds being cleaned, scope of work and cleaning methods, and create cleaning plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm sheds being cleaned, scope of work and cleaning methods, and create cleaning plan.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks.

pcs.text: Select, check and fit personal protective equipment (PPE) required for shed cleaning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and fit personal protective equipment (PPE) required for shed cleaning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and fit personal protective equipment (PPE) required for shed cleaning.

pcs.text: Identify environmental hazards associated with cleaning of sheds, and assess and control risks according to regulatory and enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental hazards associated with cleaning of sheds, and assess and control risks according to regulatory and enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental hazards associated with cleaning of sheds, and assess and control risks according to regulatory and enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Raise, dismantle or remove nesting systems, feeding, watering, slats, and/or other equipment in preparation for cleaning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Raise, dismantle or remove nesting systems, feeding, watering, slats, and/or other equipment in preparation for cleaning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Raise, dismantle or remove nesting systems, feeding, watering, slats, and/or other equipment in preparation for cleaning.

pcs.text: Cover or seal electrical switchboards and other equipment to prevent entry of water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Cover or seal electrical switchboards and other equipment to prevent entry of water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Cover or seal electrical switchboards and other equipment to prevent entry of water.

pcs.text: Apply insecticides as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply insecticides as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply insecticides as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to clean sheds

elements.title: Clean shed and shed equipment

pcs.text: Remove and dispose of poultry litter and/or manure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and dispose of poultry litter and/or manure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and dispose of poultry litter and/or manure.

pcs.text: Service filters and flush drinker lines and tanks if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Service filters and flush drinker lines and tanks if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Service filters and flush drinker lines and tanks if required.

pcs.text: Clean and service feeders, drinkers and other specified equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and service feeders, drinkers and other specified equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and service feeders, drinkers and other specified equipment.

pcs.text: Select, mix and prepare cleaning agents according to supplier instructions and enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, mix and prepare cleaning agents according to supplier instructions and enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, mix and prepare cleaning agents according to supplier instructions and enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Use equipment and tools to clean specified shed surfaces
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use equipment and tools to clean specified shed surfaces?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use equipment and tools to clean specified shed surfaces.

pcs.text: Dry clean electrical equipment and other items that may be damaged by water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dry clean electrical equipment and other items that may be damaged by water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dry clean electrical equipment and other items that may be damaged by water.

pcs.text: Manage waste and run-off from cleaning activity according to regulatory and enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage waste and run-off from cleaning activity according to regulatory and enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage waste and run-off from cleaning activity according to regulatory and enterprise requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Clean shed and shed equipment

elements.title: Sanitise, disinfect or fumigate shed

pcs.text: Select and fit PPE required for sanitising, disinfecting or fumigation of shed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit PPE required for sanitising, disinfecting or fumigation of shed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit PPE required for sanitising, disinfecting or fumigation of shed.

pcs.text: Select and prepare equipment and agents required to sanitise, disinfect or fumigate shed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare equipment and agents required to sanitise, disinfect or fumigate shed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare equipment and agents required to sanitise, disinfect or fumigate shed.

pcs.text: Cover or protect electrical equipment and seal shed to minimise escape of disinfectant as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Cover or protect electrical equipment and seal shed to minimise escape of disinfectant as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Cover or protect electrical equipment and seal shed to minimise escape of disinfectant as required.

pcs.text: Use equipment to apply agents to disinfect shed according to regulatory and enterprise safety and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use equipment to apply agents to disinfect shed according to regulatory and enterprise safety and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use equipment to apply agents to disinfect shed according to regulatory and enterprise safety and environmental requirements.

pcs.text: Ventilate shed to remove unsafe remnants of disinfectant agents prior to entry of workers, re-installation of equipment and placement of poultry and/or eggs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ventilate shed to remove unsafe remnants of disinfectant agents prior to entry of workers, re-installation of equipment and placement of poultry and/or eggs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ventilate shed to remove unsafe remnants of disinfectant agents prior to entry of workers, re-installation of equipment and placement of poultry and/or eggs.

pcs.text: Check, install and/or adjust pest, vermin and/or predator controls as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check, install and/or adjust pest, vermin and/or predator controls as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check, install and/or adjust pest, vermin and/or predator controls as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Sanitise, disinfect or fumigate shed

elements.title: Finalise cleaning and disinfecting process

pcs.text: Check cleaning and disinfection has been completed according to the required scope and standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check cleaning and disinfection has been completed according to the required scope and standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check cleaning and disinfection has been completed according to the required scope and standards.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store cleaning and disinfection equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store cleaning and disinfection equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store cleaning and disinfection equipment.

pcs.text: Store or dispose of leftover cleaning and disinfection agents, fluids, containers and waste according to regulatory and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store or dispose of leftover cleaning and disinfection agents, fluids, containers and waste according to regulatory and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store or dispose of leftover cleaning and disinfection agents, fluids, containers and waste according to regulatory and environmental requirements.

pcs.text: Complete records and report issues to management according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records and report issues to management according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records and report issues to management according to enterprise requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Finalise cleaning and disinfecting process

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
